sections.paragraph: m. plur. prop. given, bestowed [Nethinim], the name given to the ἱερόδουλοι of the Hebrews, or the bondsmen of the temple who attended on the Levites in their sacred service, Ezr 8:17, 20 Ezr 8:20 Neh 3:31 7:46 , 60 , 73 11:3 , 21 Neh 11:21, etc. As to the origin of the word, compare Num 8:19. Chald. Ezr 7:24.
